name: Applesauce Mint Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup dried mint OR 1/4 cup chopped fresh mint
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients and nuts together in a mixing bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the egg, applesauce, mint, and oil. Stir until just blended.
3. Add the wet mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 50 minutes.
6. Cool on a rack.
7. Wrap the bread in plastic or foil when completely cool.
